tech_name: Tandem Object Relational Data Mining Architecture
notes: Never achieved de facto standard status; Compaq acquisition 1997 led to deprioritization; architectural vision later vindicated by MPP analytics
NonStop SQL (now NonStop SQL/MX) continues under HPE NonStop division; highly durable
NT-based database platform; discontinued after Compaq acquisition
HPE Integrity NonStop servers are lineal successors; still used in mission-critical finance/telecom
Target deployment platform for ServerWare; succeeded by Windows 2000/2003 Server
Object-relational extension technology; Informix acquired by IBM 2001; DataBlade concept absorbed into DB2
MPP architecture continues in modern data warehouses (Teradata, Snowflake, BigQuery)
Decision-tree data mining tool; company acquired by Datawatch 2018
